project_info.name: Gajab Ambassador Affiliate Program
project_info.description: A vibrant, mobile-first ambassador portal and desktop-first admin console for Gajab.com's student affiliate program.
project_info.design_philosophy: Bold Indian commerce UI with vibrant promo energy, social sharing cues, gamified rewards, and mobile-first card-based discovery. Distinctly 'Gajab'—loud, rewarding, and deeply engaging.

typography.rules: Never use Inter or generic defaults for headings. Embrace character.

headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, large stat numbers, and playful badges.

colors.global_rules: No generic tech blue or muted purples. High contrast, warm, energetic.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous spacing globally. Tight density only inside data grids.

grid_patterns.bento: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4 or gap-6

surfaces_and_styles.cards: Solid #FFFFFF background, rounded-2xl, border-2 border-[#EAE6E1], shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(234,230,225,1)] (neo-brutalist inspired tactile pop). Hover: translate-y-[-2px] shadow-[0_6px_0_0_rgba(234,230,225,1)].
surfaces_and_styles.badges: Sticker style. rounded-full, high contrast bg/text (e.g., Yellow bg, Black text), rotate-[-2deg] or rotate-[2deg] for playful feel.
surfaces_and_styles.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism over content, or solid white with a strong bottom border.
surfaces_and_styles.buttons: Primary: Gajab Red bg, white text, font-bold, rounded-xl. Hover: scale 1.02. Active: scale 0.95.

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements MUST have a visible hover state (color change + slight transform).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion: initial opacity-0 y-4, animate opacity-100 y-0, transition duration 0.3s.
motion_and_interactions.gamification: Bounce effects on point increments. Confetti or scaled animations when tasks are approved or levels gained.

icons.style: Stroke width 2.5 for a bolder, more playful appearance.

shadcn_overrides.button: Increase border radius to rounded-xl. Add font-bricolage and font-bold.
shadcn_overrides.card: Override default Vercel look. Add thick borders (border-2) and offset shadows for tactile feel.
shadcn_overrides.input: Height h-12, rounded-xl, bg-white, border-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:border-primary.
shadcn_overrides.table: Dense layout for admin. In ambassador view, avoid standard tables; use stacked mobile-friendly card lists instead.

component_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

public_apply_page.layout: Marketing Landing. Free-flowing, visually loud, story-driven.
sections: Hero: Headline 'Become a Gajab Campus Ambassador', Subtext, CTA 'Apply Now', Abstract vibrant background.
How it Works: 3-step bento grid with custom sticker icons.
Perks/Earnings: Gamified visualization of potential earnings (Coins/Cash).
Testimonials: Grid of student photos with quote cards.
Application Form: Multi-step wizard (Personal -> College -> Socials), styled playfully.

ambassador_auth.layout: Split screen desktop (Left: vibrant brand visual, Right: form). Mobile: Form centered with logo top.
ambassador_auth.features: Phone/Email input, OTP 6-digit mock verification, forced first-time password setup.

ambassador_dashboard.layout: Mobile-first app wrapper. Bottom navigation bar on mobile (Home, Tasks, Leaderboard, Profile). Side nav on desktop.
key_elements: Home: Hero Referral Link card with quick copy. 2x2 grid of key metrics. Sticky 'My Rank' pill at the bottom.
Tasks: Tabbed view (Pending, Review, Approved). Card-based layout with prominent 'Submit Proof' CTAs.
Leaderboard: Top 3 Podium visualization (1st, 2nd, 3rd) using 3D coin assets. List below it.
Referrals: Clean list of assigned promo codes, usage bars, and commission earned per code.

admin_console.layout: Desktop-first dense dashboard. Persistent left sidebar.
key_elements: Applicants: Data table with slide-out drawer for review. Highlight duplicate flags in red.
Directory: Powerful search/filter, KPI cards at top.
Tasks Manager: Split view. Left: Create Task form. Right: Queue of pending verifications with inline Approve/Reject.
Referrals Manager: Detailed tables for codes and utilization. Modals for creating new rules.

hero_and_abstract.description: Vibrant blue and pink gradient illustration
hero_and_abstract.usage: Marketing page hero background, login screen visual side.
Banners, promotional cards, or level-up celebration backgrounds.

students_and_lifestyle.description: Group of diverse college students engaged in outdoor group study session
students_and_lifestyle.usage: Marketing page 'Community' section, hero image overlay.

students_and_lifestyle.description: Two students capturing video content using a mobile stabilizer
students_and_lifestyle.usage: Ambassador tasks showcase, 'Create Content' task visuals.

students_and_lifestyle.description: Indian student with a backpack looking at his phone

gamification_elements.description: 3D rendering of golden coins stacked with purple background
gamification_elements.usage: Leaderboard podiums, rewards section, payout balance headers.

gamification_elements.description: 3D render of stacked gold coins on blue background
gamification_elements.usage: Earnings milestones, 'How it Works' coin representation.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT build a generic SaaS dashboard. Inject the 'Indian Bazaar' energy—use stickers, overlapping badges, and vibrant colors.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing `/apply` page to allow for complete creative freedom (bento grids, asymmetric layouts).
Use Shadcn UI extensively for the Admin Console, but customize the spacing and borders to match the design system.
For the Ambassador Dashboard, strictly adopt a mobile-first approach. Use bottom navigation for small screens. Avoid complex data tables on mobile; use stacked cards instead.
Use Bricolage Grotesque for all headings. Import it via Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter.
Ensure the Gajab Red (#E11D2A) is the primary CTA color, while Yellow (#FFC93C) is used for highlights and gamification elements.
Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='apply-submit-btn'`).
Integrate Framer Motion for micro-interactions: slight bounce on button clicks, smooth tab transitions, staggered entry for leaderboard items.
Replace generic avatars with the provided student imagery where applicable.
Mock all backend logic. Use state management or context to simulate the application flow, login, and task submission.
For the leaderboard, build a visually distinct top-3 podium using CSS grids and the provided 3D coin assets.
